description: You are a Computer and Information Systems Manager at a mid-size financial services firm. Following a penetration test by CyberGuard Solutions, you must coordinate the remediation of three critical vulnerabilities (CVE-2026-0142, CVE-2026-0198, CVE-2026-0215) for PCI-DSS compliance. Using Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!), acknowledge the report in #security-alerts by starring the message and replying in a thread to confirm mobilization. Organize the remediation effort by creating a private channel named 'sec-remediation-2026-03-06' with the topic 'Critical | CVE-2026-0142, CVE-2026-0198, CVE-2026-0215 | Remediation deadline: 2026-03-13', inviting the relevant team (ciso, security.analyst, vendor.liaison, compliance.officer, and devops.lead), pinning a vulnerability triage matrix for the CVEs, and posting a status update on containment and vendor contact. Coordinate specific requirements via direct messages to compliance.officer regarding PCI-DSS notification requirements and to vendor.liaison regarding PayStream and IdentityBridge patch availability.
